---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a workflow, framework, asset, or UX improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What should improve?

Describe the desired improvement.

## Who benefits?

Explain the user type or workflow this helps.

## Which phase?

- [ ] Phase 1: UI ideation
- [ ] Phase 2: asset production
- [ ] Phase 3: frontend implementation
- [ ] Install, docs, or examples

## Example input or output

Share a prompt, screenshot, repo structure, or desired artifact.
